/CAL:RESTITUTION HEARING//X:DEFENDNT FILED EXHIBIT 1-LETTER DATED 3-9-04, EXH, 2-LETTER DATED/ /X:5-25-05 AND EXH, 3-TWO RECEIPTS WHICH ARE MOVED IN EVIDENCE/ /X:PEOPLE FILED AN ABSTRACT OF JUDGEMENT & ORDER OF RESTITUTION/ARG&SUB/   /CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO PAY THE TOTAL AMOUNT OF $3,537 TO MR, BEN DEVRIES/
/CAL:RESTITUTION HEARING//REST:993,84 TO THE STATE VICTIM COMPENSATION BOARD/CONTD: FURTHER PROCEEDINGS, RE:LEASE/DOP/

/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ9D/CTS 9/DNA/VF4 200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/PROBFINE/SECFEEDOMVF/WEAP/ALCO//CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL FINISH A 52 WEEK DV COUNSELLING PROGRAM OR/X:ANY KIND OF COUNSELLING AS PER APD/SA1:BEN DEVRIES-88 PERRY ST#515 AND 350 TOWNSENDST#308/ /CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL PAY OUT OF POCKET RESTITUTION TO VICTIM AND THE/X:VICTIM COMPENSATION BOARD WHICH SHALL BE DETERMINED IN A HEARING//CONTD:RESTITUTION HEARING AND REFERRAL TO DV COUNSELLING/OBEY/ACCEP/

***MOVE CASE TO SENTENCE EVENT AND NEW LINE NUMBER,  ENTER THE NOLO PLEA AND SENTENCE ON THE NEW LINE NUMBER, THEN DELETE THIS HINT***/TEXT:DEFT ADV &PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:1/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATEDDISPOSITION/X:PROPOSED DISPOSITION, ISS-3 YRS, PROB TO APD; CJ-CTS;RESTV;DNA,/X:PSR; PC; BK;ALCO;DOMV;DOMVFCOUN;WEAP;STAY AWAY;MISD/OR/BE/GTW/CTORD:ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT TO FILE PSR BY 03-24-05/X:DEFENDANT IS TO SUFFER 6 MONTHS IN JAIL IF SHE FAILS TO APPEAR/ /X:SENTENCING,/REPREQ:B:03-24-05/

/X:CAUSE IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 28, FORTHWITH; TO BE HEARD//X:BEFORE  JUDGE DONALDSON FOR PRETRIAL,/RET22//MO TO CONT:BY DEFENSE FOR THE FOLLOWING REASON:UNAVIALABILITY OF WITNESSES/CAUSE/  /CGTW/MO GRTD/
/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING/WIT SWORN:BENJAMIN DEVRIES//EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1-MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION//HTA1: 1-273,5(A)PC-F; 2-245(A)1PC-F/BAIL:SB00207282/
/CONTD:RESTITUTION HEARING/DAWF//X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 4 IS MARKED FOR IDENTIFICTION AND IS WITH THE JUDGE/
/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 27//TRANS 27:FORTHWITH FOR DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW PLEA/
/CTORD: CASE PRETRIED AND TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/
/CTORD: CASE PRETRIED AND TRIAL DATE CONFIRMED/
